2603.29632.title: An Empirical Study of Multi-Agent Collaboration for Automated Research
2603.29632.paper_summary: As AI agents evolve, the community is rapidly shifting from single Large Language Models (LLMs) to Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) to overcome cognitive bottlenecks in automated research. However, the optimal multi-agent coordination framework for these autonomous agents remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical study investigating the comparative efficacy of distinct multi-agent structures for automated machine learning optimization. Utilizing a rigorously controlled, execution-based testbed equipped with Git worktree isolation and explicit global memory, we benchmark a single-agent baseline against two multi-agent paradigms: a subagent architecture (parallel exploration with post-hoc consolidation) and an agent team architecture (experts with pre-execution handoffs). By evaluating these systems under strictly fixed computational time budgets, our findings reveal a fundamental trade-off between operational stability and theoretical deliberation. The subagent mode functions as a highly resilient, high-throughput search engine optimal for broad, shallow optimizations under strict time constraints. Conversely, the agent team topology exhibits higher operational fragility due to multi-author code generation but achieves the deep theoretical alignment necessary for complex architectural refactoring given extended compute budgets. These empirical insights provide actionable guidelines for designing future autoresearch systems, advocating for dynamically routed architectures that adapt their collaborative structures to real-time task complexity.
2603.29632.paper_summary_zh: 隨著人工智慧代理的演進，社群正迅速從單一大型語言模型 (LLMs) 轉向多代理系統 (MAS)，以克服自動化研究中的認知瓶頸。然後，這些自主代理的最佳多代理協調框架仍然在很大程度上未被探索。在本文中，我們提出了一項系統的實證研究，調查不同多代理結構在自動化機器學習優化中的比較效能。利用一個嚴格控制的執行基準測試平台，該平台配備了 Git 工作樹隔離和明確的全局記憶，我們將單代理基準與兩種多代理範式進行基準測試：一種子代理架構（平行探索與事後整合）和一種代理團隊架構（專家與執行前交接）。通過在嚴格固定的計算時間預算下評估這些系統，我們的研究結果揭示了操作穩定性與理論深思之間的基本權衡。子代理模式作為一個高度彈性、高吞吐量的搜索引擎，在嚴格的時間限制下最佳適用於廣泛且淺層的優化。相對而言，代理團隊拓撲因多作者代碼生成而顯示出更高的操作脆弱性，但在延長的計算預算下實現了複雜架構重構所需的深度理論對齊。這些實證見解為設計未來自動研究系統提供了可行的指導方針，倡導動態路由架構，根據實時任務複雜性調整其協作結構。
2603.29632.author: Yang Shen et.al.
2603.29632.authors: Yang Shen, Zhenyi Yi, Ziyi Zhao, Lijun Sun, Dongyang Li, Chin-Teng Lin, Yuhui Shi
